$comment: Layer C for REMIT vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (file I/O stage 1 + WRITE ... FROM). The desugared MOVE WS-LINE TO REMIT-REC pairs are ordinary moves into flow-neutral record storage (OPEN/WRITE/CLOSE do not touch the symbolic store); the 1.5% charge's ROUNDED half-cent boundary is congruence-solved on the single path, and every realized case runs through the file-serializing wrapper differentially.

legacy.label: COBOL 85 REMIT (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-remit, file-serializing wrapper)
